headline: Is Ulta (ULTA) a Solid Growth Stock? 3 Reasons to Think "Yes"
summary: Ulta (ULTA) is well positioned to outperform the market, as it exhibits above-average growth in financials.

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Ulta (ULTA): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Ulta (ULTA). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Delivery reliability trumps speed, Macy’s and Ulta execs say
summary: Maintaining on-time delivery promises will keep shoppers coming back, but fast shipping still has a role to play, retail leaders said at Home Delivery World 2026.
